mapper.select: SELECT rt.restNo AS restNo, rt.restName AS restName, rt.address AS address, rt.latitude AS latitude, rt.longitude AS longitude, rv.reviewTitle AS reviewTitle, rv.reviewContent AS reviewContent FROM restaurant rt LEFT JOIN ( SELECT r1.restNo, r1.reviewTitle, r1.reviewContent FROM review r1 WHERE r1.createDate = ( SELECT MAX(r2.createDate) FROM review r2 WHERE r2.restNo = r1.restNo ) ) rv ON rt.restNo = rv.restNo WHERE rt.latitude BETWEEN #{swLat} AND #{neLat} AND rt.longitude BETWEEN #{swLng} AND #{neLng}
mapper.insert:
SELECT restaurant_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
insert into restaurant values (#{restNo}, #{restName}, #{address}, #{longitude}, #{latitude})
